hero.name: Benjamin Jarlsson Nemeth
hero.description: I build systems that connect engineering, software, and intelligent behavior. My focus is on creating thoughtful, scalable solutions that combine theory with practical implementation.

sections.title: Who am I?
sections.text: I’m an Electrical Engineering student at DTU with strong interests in software, AI, robotics, and systems design. I enjoy building projects where multiple fields come together into one coherent system.

sections.title: About
sections.text: Learn more about my background, interests, technical focus areas, and long-term vision.

sections.title: Projects
sections.text: Explore the projects I’ve built, the systems I’m working on, and the ideas I’m testing across hardware, software, and design.

sections.title: Why contact?
sections.text: Reach out if you want to collaborate, discuss ideas, explore technical work, or connect around engineering, AI, systems, or product-building.

items.title: DTU — Electrical Engineering (Ongoing)
items.description: Currently pursuing a Bachelor's degree in Electrical Engineering, focusing on systems design, electronics, and software integration.

items.title: Top Grades — TN-102 & Mat-100
items.description: Achieved the highest grade (12) in both TN-102 and Mat-100, demonstrating strong analytical and mathematical capabilities.

items.title: Independent Engineering Projects
items.description: Designed and built multiple full-stack and hardware-integrated projects, combining software, systems design, and real-world problem solving.

items.title: Technical Work — Ryde Technologies
items.description: Worked with hardware diagnostics and repair of electric scooters, gaining hands-on experience with electronics, troubleshooting, and system reliability.

items.title: St. Olav / UiS Coursework
items.description: Completed advanced technical coursework alongside high school studies, achieving top results and building early academic foundations.
